name: Citrus Grilled Jumbo Scallops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine the water, wine, lemon juice, butter, honey, and minced garlic. Place over medium heat and reduce the mixture to almost half, stirring frequently.
2. Add the cornstarch solution, adjusting to taste. Remove from heat and keep warm.
3. Grill the scallop halves over hot coals, brushing them frequently with melted butter until cooked to taste.
4. Remove the scallops from the grill and place 6 scallop halves on each plate.
5. Pour the citrus sauce over the scallops and garnish with chopped parsley.
